note: Freshly-reproduced exact blockers for the families targeted under maximum pressure this sprint. Promotions land in v321_sidecar_matrix.json / live_evidence; everything below is kept honestly hidden with the exact reproduced failure and the precise unblock condition.

resolved_live.via: py3.11 transformers==4.44.2 Docker sidecar (flash_attn dropped, eager attention)
OpenMMLab mmcv-2.1 Docker sidecar, pose2d=human auto-download, CPU, HTTP /predict/pose

still_blocked.reproduced: natten 0.21.6+torch2110cu130 IS installed, but `transformers.models.dinat.modeling_dinat` does `from natten.functional import natten2dav, natten2dqkrpb` -> ImportError: cannot import name 'natten2dav' (removed in natten >=0.17). DiNAT needs natten <=0.15.x, which in turn pins an older torch.
still_blocked.unblock_condition: Isolated sidecar with natten 0.15.x + matching torch + transformers DiNAT, OR a transformers release that targets the natten >=0.17 fused-NA API.
still_blocked.note: Low marginal value: oneformer-swin-large is already SEGMENTATION_READY_LIVE, so the OneFormer family is operational without dinat.

still_blocked.reproduced: No released checkpoint for the ConvNeXt OneFormer variant on HF or the official model zoo; weights were never published.
still_blocked.unblock_condition: Upstream publishes ConvNeXt OneFormer weights under a permissive license. Permanent blocker until then.

still_blocked.reproduced: HF search for 'RT-DETRv4' returns only community manga-detection fine-tunes (tori29umai/rtdetrv4-x-manga109s, aoiandroid/...). No official numbered RT-DETRv4 release or general-purpose checkpoint exists.
still_blocked.unblock_condition: An official RT-DETRv4 release with a verified, permissively-licensed general checkpoint. Cannot operationalize a model whose weights do not exist.

still_blocked.reproduced: Official checkpoints DO exist on HF (e.g. Intellindust/DEIMv2_DINOv3_S_COCO), upgrading the prior 'availability not independently verified'. But DEIMv2 is a DINOv3-backbone + DEIM-head custom architecture: the checkpoint is a raw state_dict that needs the official DEIMv2 repo code to instantiate, NOT a transformers/timm-loadable model.
still_blocked.unblock_condition: Vendor the DEIMv2 repo model code into an isolated sidecar (+ confirm the DINOv3 backbone weights are not gated) and wire a normalizer (sidecars/deimv2_normalize.py already exists). Checkpoint existence is now confirmed; the remaining work is the custom-architecture loader.

still_blocked.reproduced: No HF/pip-installable path; DEIM (CVPR'25) ships as an official training repo with custom architecture. Checkpoints require the upstream repo loader.
still_blocked.unblock_condition: Vendor the DEIM repo model code into an isolated sidecar with a verified permissive checkpoint.
